reviews.comment:
Excelente estacion de servicio para hacer una parada. Tiene lugar para estacionar y uma zona de descanso. Tiene bar y restaurant y todos los servicios que ofrece el ACA. Baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station for a stop. It has parking and a rest area. It has a bar and restaurant and all the services offered by the ACA. Clean restrooms.
